reviews:
Review 1: rating 5.0. I am very happy with this serum I am very happy with this serum. In the past, any retinol product has caused irritation and burning. So far, this does not. I have not been using it long enough to see any visible difference, but the ingredient list is very good, and I feel confident in continuing to use it. I use if after OZ's tonic and it seems to absorb quickly into my skin.... time will tell !!

Review 2: rating 5.0. This serum feels so wonderful on my skin This serum feels so wonderful on my skin, it goes on smoothly and is absorbed well. It leaves my skin feeling so soft and hydrated.

Review 3: rating 5.0. Wonderful I love this product!  It goes on smooth without a tacky feel.  It absorbs quickly in the skin.  I pair this with the Oz Naturals Retinol Moisturizer and I wake up with the softness skin imaginable.  It doesn't irritate my skin or cause it to dry out either.  I'll def keep using this product.

Review 4: rating 5.0. A true powerhouse in a small bottle : After washing my face for bed, one pump is more than enough to lightly cover completely, and my skin drinks it in. A few minutes later, I follow up with the OZNaturals Super Youth Retinol Moisturizer. No reaction or drying of my skin, and my pillowcases aren't discolored like prior products I've used. It's best to use this product at night, and with the cold pressed technology in this serum, I get the true and highest concentration of the ingredients. I have noticed a considerable difference in the tone in my complexion with a nice radiant look. I could not be happier, and look forward to the future results from using this serum, as it will be another product in my arsenal of skincare from OZ Naturals.

Review 5: rating 5.0. Noticeably smoother skin and improvement in problem areas I found this product to be effective at smoothing out my skin.  I've been using it for about a week and see a change in my skin.  It seems smoother and more supple.  I am hoping that it improves the absorbsion of the topical antioxidents I use, especially Oz Natural's C serum products.  I found this especially effective on the parts of my skin that have psoriasis, reducing flaking and peeling, and making my skin much smoothier and less irritated in the problem areas.  Recommended, with sunblock for protection.

Review 6: rating 5.0. Another Great OZ Product! Like all OZ products, this one is a winner too. You can feel the serum working within 2 minutes after application. After 5 days off use I can see a difference in the tone of skin-brighter, tighter, and a noticeable reduction of fine lines. Great product, great price=win win.

Review 7: rating 5.0. Love this new Cold-processing Product! I am a huge fan of the OZ Natural product line, and this product is yet another great one. The OZ Naturals people have developed a new line of cold-processing products, and as hard as it is to believe, these products are even better. As instructed, I use this product at bedtime, and my skin is extremely soft and smooth in the morning. I especially like the pump applicator - one small pump and there is enough serum to cover my entire face and neck area. Strongly recommend!

Review 8: rating 5.0. Easy to apply! I have been using Oz Naturals for a while and I love this serum. The pump makes application easy and I get just the right amount. It spreads easy and absorbs right into my skin. I does not irritate my sensitive skin and I don't notice a smell with it. I apply the serum right after washing my face before I apply the Retinol moisturizer. I feel like I'm really taking care of my face and fighting aging using these products. I also love that they are 98% natural. Great product!

Review 9: rating 5.0. Excellent product OZ Naturals provides another great addition to their skincare line with this anti-aging Retinol serum.  It contains powerful ingredients that help smooth your skin without being overly harsh like some Retinol products.  Used in conjunction with their Vitamin C and Hyaluronic Acid serums you will see much more beautiful skin.  Great customer service and very importantly cruelty free!

Review 10: rating 5.0. FEELS AWESOME!! Use this at night and you can feel it absorbing. Wake up with no oily skin. LOVE it!!!

Review 11: rating 5.0. I am so happy I ordered the retinol serum I am so happy I ordered the retinol serum! I have been using it as part of my nightly routine. I use the vitamin c serum first and add the retinol serum. My skin feels wonderful and it is never dry! I have noticed that the lines around my mouth are far less noticeable. I will order it again and would recommend it highly!

Review 12: rating 5.0. Love, love, love!!! I love this!! I have  it experienced any increased skin sensitivity (and I have really sensitive skin)! My skin appears more clear and I have noticed my grouchy line between my eyebrows seems less noticeable! I would definitely purchase this again. I also really love the way my skin feels after applying. I also use under makeup and everything looks better than ever.

Review 13: rating 5.0. This is a great retinol serum This is a great retinol serum! I do however recommend using it at night or in the morning only if you are not going to be subjected to the sun.

Review 14: rating 5.0. Another great Oz product!!! I've added this to my nightly routine, and love this product. This, along with the Oz toner, is helping my skin tone stay balanced and brighter, as well as getting rid of my horrible dark spots. Every summer my spot comes back from being in the sun, so I can't wait to continue using this through the summer to make sure those pesky spots stay away!

Review 15: rating 5.0. Five Stars Love this serum! Worth every penny, it has only been a few weeks and I can see a difference!!

Review 16: rating 5.0. New Anti Aging Retinol Serum! Another great product from OZ Naturals! Have been using this product for about 10 days and it is an improvement over the over serum - but then I like the other serum too! I haven't found any of the products I don't like! The new cold processed Vit C serum seems to be a little drying for my skin, but I solved that issue by using it at night and the retinol serum during the day. I love these products!

Review 17: rating 5.0. I love love, love the serum I love love, love the serum, great to use when your skin is acting up.

Review 18: rating 5.0. really making a difference on my skin I'm really loving this serum. I have noticed a big difference in my skin since adding retinal to my skin care regimen. It leaves me a little flaky the next morning, but only on my more sensitive areas (around my nose specifically). But that goes away after a day and a good wash with my clarisonic brush. Only wish the bottle provided better control of how much product comes out. It's hard to get less than a full pump, so I feel like I waste a little.

Review 19: rating 5.0. Love it! I've been using the OZNaturals Anti Aging Retinol Serum every night for a few weeks now and my skin seems to look brighter and smoother. Hoping that over time this will also help to lighten a couple hyper-pigmentation spots. Another great product from OZNaturals.

Review 20: rating 5.0. Another five star product I've been using as products for a few years now and like all their other products I have yet to be disappointed their products work exactly like it states and after a few times of use you can actually see your skin  improve I tend to have a lot of breakouts I also have sensitive skin so I'm always trying to find more natural ingredients to use I also suffer from a lot of redness and one thing I've noticed with awes natural products is because they are all natural they don't irritate my skin anymore and actually diminishes the redness and reduces breakouts

Review 21: rating 5.0. I've purchased this before and found that it did make ... I've purchased this before and found that it did make a difference in the problem areas.  Does it erase lines and wrinkles?  No but it does make them less noticeable.  You don't need a lot and it doesn't dry out your face after applying.

Review 22: rating 5.0. Love the Whole Line In my opinion, what puts Oz Naturals Pro-Retaxional way ahead of other retinol serums is that it is 98% Natural. I do not have to be afraid to put it on my face and neck (i.e. my thyroid gland). I know that I'm not poisoning my body with a lot of chemicals and for it to be reasonably priced, what a find.I'm in love with the whole line.BTW - I easily pass for 10 -15 years younger than I am.

Review 23: rating 5.0. Great serum Love these products and this line. My skin has been doing so much better since I got into the habit of using serum under my moisturizer and sunscreen every day. I find this particular serum very plumping and hydrating and love to use it both day and night.

Review 24: rating 5.0. Incredible Results - Love this product line! I've been using OZ Naturals products for a couple years now. As I approached my late 30s I started noticing fine lines around my eyes. I tried other natural products from my local health food store but wasn't seeing the results I wanted. After doing a bit of searching I came across the OZ Naturals line and I'm so happy that I did! Their products are the only thing I use on my skin now (except for makeup) and I've gotten remarks from several people that I look years younger than my true age. Now I'm 40 and look younger than I did a couple years ago! I'm definitely a lot more confident and happier with the way my skin looks. The Anti-Aging Retinol Serum is something that I use regularly. I apply it at night after washing my skin and using the Ocean Minerals Tonic. I also use the Super Youth Retinol Moisturizer. I have less lines around my eye area and better overall skin tone. Part of the reason I was attracted to these products is that they're all natural, so I love them even more now that they're cold processed!

Review 25: rating 4.0. I have used OZNaturals Retinol Serum before and liked the effects I have used OZNaturals Retinol Serum before and liked the effects. The newly formulated product is really good as well. I use it every night after cleaning my makeup and I have seen great results. I did see improvement in the dullness on my skin

Review 26: rating 5.0. Fantastic product! This is a fantastic product! I have been using for 3 weeks every night and have noticed great results! The best results are in the thicker wrinkle/crease on the bottom of my jaw line. It has definitely minimized the crease. It has helped with the fine lines around my eyes. I would say the combination of a few products have helped. I am using from OZNaturals the spray mineral tonic, followed by Vitiman C with AHA then hyaluronic acid, then another product of niacinamide (vit B3)- helps minimize pores- followed up with the retinol moisturizer from OZNaturals. I think this combination has given me great results over the past month. I do use a mask a couple times a week Vit. C hydration mask from OZNaturals and a bentonite clay mask. I have seen brighter skin, tighter pores, moisturized skin and the wrinkles are a bit diminished!

Review 27: rating 5.0. So awesome for the skin! I am a huge fan of this serum. First of all, I love the pump dispenser, It gives you just enough serum to completely cover your face and a bit of your neck. It glides on really smooth and absorbs into the skin after a few minutes. It makes my skin look really nice and smooth, and I am definitely going to continue to use it in the future.

Review 28: rating 5.0. I like to use this after my vitamin C Have been using OZ naturals Pro-Retaxinol 2.5 Retinol Serum for the past few weeks and it really works well with all their other products. I like to use this after my vitamin C. Works great. Happy with this purchase!

Review 29: rating 5.0. Great alternative to prescription Retin-A This is definitely one of my favorite products and I routinely use it every day. I love the consistency and dispensing option. A little goes a long way and the price is certainly affordable.  With repeated and consistent use, you will see an improvement in the appearance of your skin and a reduction in fine lines. Adding in the other OZ products such as the Vitamin c serum or hyluraonic acid  definitely compliments this product.  Love it!

Review 30: rating 1.0. Changed ingredients - now acids and fillers New ingredients 4/2017 = altered effect. Used to be 7 ingredients, all of which were recognizable to a consumer ('rose hips'). Now it includes at least 20, including 'glycerin' and 'phenylpropanol'. P-anisic acid, anyone? I experienced insomnia and an upset GI system after using. A once trustworthy company going for the cheap.and hopefully losing lots of us.Retinol used to be the first ingredient...Now this:AQUA, GLYCERIN, 1,3 PROPANDIOL, RETINOL, CAPRIC CAPRYLIC TRIGLYCERIDES, HAEMATOCOCCUS PLUVIALIS EXTRACT, SODIUM HYALURONATE, HAMAMELIS VIRGINIANA (WITCH HAZEL) EXTRACT, XANTHAN GUM, ROSA CANINA FRUIT EXTRACT, CAMELLIA SINENSIS LEAF EXTRACT, CHAMOMILLA RECUTITA (MATRICARIA) EXTRACT, POLYSORBATE 20, P ANISIC ACID,  PHENYLPROPANOL, PROPANEDIOL, CAPRYLYL GLYCOL , TOCOPHEROL, CITRIC ACID, BIXA ORELLANA SEED EXTRACT. I

Review 31: rating 1.0. Smells bad It has been 2 years I am using this product and others from this line and I have experienced very good results. This time I cannot use it it smells so bad. 😒

Review 32: rating 2.0. Eww!! Do t know of this works yet but it smells HORRIBLE!!  Really might need to return it just based on that alone. I feel like I am putting pee on my face. Actually might be worse smelling than that.

Review 33: rating 5.0. Good product so far! I began using the OZ Naturals anti aging Retinol serum a little over a month ago. I haven't noticed anything different in the overall appearance of my skin yet. I'll update my review once I've used the entire bottle. It doesn't have a scent and a little goes a long way.. I apply at night after toner and typically need just 1 pump to cover my face and part of neck. I wish I had more control in the dispensing since I don't need a full 2 pumps, maybe 1.5. It goes on very slippery and dries quickly. I love the ingredients, customer service, discounts, pricing and overall experience in using OZ Naturals products. I look forward to trying more products.. they run out of stock quickly so grab them while you can!

Review 34: rating 5.0. As an Esthetician I have tried everything. I love this line & am addicted. My skin glows As an Esthetician I have tried everything. I love this line & am addicted. My skin glows & I receive tons of compliments on my complexion - for a 49 year old - I'm very happy to hear that! I also don't need to wear as much make-up anymore since using OZNaturals.

Review 35: rating 1.0. One Star I've been using it for two weeks, I don't see any difference.

Review 36: rating 5.0. one application was all it took... I've been looking for something to help with preventative aging for some time, I'm a male, early 30s, who started noticing early signs of aging. I've tried everything from OTC stuff at super market, to strange diets consisting of bones broths and callegen.... maybe it helped, maybe it didn't... but it took only one application of this product to notice considerable difference. My skin feels softer and toned. I'm going to start ordering more from OZ from now on--- and??? It's only 17 bucks! Can't beat the price!
persona: This customer prioritizes visible results and sensory experience in skincare and haircare products, favoring items that deliver noticeable improvements in skin texture and appearance while maintaining a pleasant scent and feel, and values products that support natural moisture balance without irritation.
reference_output: rating 5.0. I Love This Product! The Oz Anti Aging is my go to product for my face after cleansing.  Leaves it very soft, and I've been complemented on how young I look.  I'm 70 and love the compliments!

reviews:
Review 1: rating 1.0. Ladies please don’t waste your money! [[VIDEOID:d354ebfd805e62302642fad1c8bcfc8f]] Omg! I got this yesterday and used it once. I try it again and it doesn’t work smh Will be returning asap

Review 2: rating 1.0. So disappointed.. Don't buy they sell these used that's gross, at least mine was. I found hair in my item. So disappointed....

Review 3: rating 2.0. Two Stars I did not receive the nail  clipper set with the drill.

Review 4: rating 2.0. Broken already? Worked less than 5 months 😭

Review 5: rating 5.0. Loved it. Exactly what I ordered. Loved it.

Review 6: rating 5.0. Works just as I hoped it would. Just love it! Nicely powerful and super portable.

Review 7: rating 1.0. Showed up busted? Would not go fast enough to grind a tissue paper! The red light on the charger just blinked, no response about a replacement or way to fix it.

Review 8: rating 3.0. No bur lock nice kit. i use for my manicures.The only problem that once you put bur in it is hard to remove it. I have to use pliers to remove the bur everytime. I cannot use it for clients. It is embarrassing. I have to buy one with lock.

Review 9: rating 2.0. Died after 6mos. Purchased 5/10/18, easy to use, LOVED doing my own powder dip nails at home. This morning, 12/3/18, it wont spin. It's plugged in (tried several different outlets) and I can hear the black plug in box buzzing, but the drill will not spin. I adjusted the dial, nothing. It's like the power source just up and quit. I'll be purchasing a different drill.

Review 10: rating 1.0. Safety Issue This drill worked a few times but began to sporadically turn off while I used it. It became overheated and burnt my hand during one usage.. I attempted to turn it off but the switch had completely melted. I had to unplug it to get it to stop. The light stayed on and there was a smell of something burning coming from it. I used it maybe 5-6 times before this happened.

Review 11: rating 1.0. DO NOT BUY I bought this item even after reading some negative review and I was disappointed.. i used it one time and the next day that I tried to use it, it didn't want to turn on any more. DO NOT BUY THIS ITEM!!!

Review 12: rating 5.0. Perfect pedicures! This has just the right amount of power which can be higher or lowered.  Works way better than the battery operated style ones and it has plenty of cord length for me anyway. No more loss of power in the middle of doing my nails! Lots of attachments to shape and file your nails.  Great for pedicures  and the price was great, too!

Review 13: rating 1.0. Not great I used it like maybe 5times and it broke

Review 14: rating 1.0. Worth it must buy Had wrote a good review but made sure to come back and update actually used for 2 times and loved it I was about to use it for my 3rd time and it just didn’t want to turn on anymore and I’m very upset !

Review 15: rating 5.0. Got more than i expected! Works amazing. Speed works front n backwards. The extra nail set is really good quality. Really i got more than i bargained for!! I love it. N its pink!!! :)

Review 16: rating 1.0. Stopped working after 3 uses! I had this nail file/grinder for less than 1 year. I used it a total of 3 times. Always kept it in the bag it came in. It worked fine for the 3 times I used it. Tried to use it recently. It turned on for a few seconds then went dead. I tried different outlets, nothing. Very annoying!!

Review 17: rating 1.0. Don’t waste your time. Do not buy. It hardly works. They nail bits are hard to take out and they do not do anything.

Review 18: rating 1.0. Stopped working after only 4 1/2 months I loved this electric nail file. I ordered it in May and I went to use it tonight and it ran for about 2 minutes and just quit working. I’m not so happy about that, wouldn’t you think it would work longer then 4 1/2 months!!!

Review 19: rating 5.0. super great this is the cutest most convenient product i've  brought i love doing nails so this is great it came with every single piece the guide to use is great with pictures. i used it on my boyfriends toes ( he has horrible toe nails) and he never wanted to go to the nail salon because he was embarrassed so i brought this and i can say that it worked out great. i recommend it and it brings a small pouch and everything fits perfectly and you can travel with it, not heavy or anything. i loved it

Review 20: rating 2.0. Broke fast Use a few times and it broke

Review 21: rating 3.0. Extra careful when using this product! I love how the set came in. But I honestly thought it was going to be a little easier to use. When using this product you have to be extra careful because you can really do some damange to your nail and finger.

Review 22: rating 1.0. not great quit working in 6 weeks

Review 23: rating 1.0. Sucks These cheap are all the same

Review 24: rating 5.0. Great little hand drill I got this for sanding small polymer clay charms. I love it.  I've sanded all these pieces with it.

Review 25: rating 5.0. This is great! This arrived today and I used it to take off the gel polish I’ve been wearing all month long. I’m looking into cheaper alternatives instead of heading to the nail salon to get my nails and toes done. I will be enjoying saving thousands of dollars every year! Great and easy to use!

Review 26: rating 1.0. DIDN'T EVEN LAST A YEAR STOPPED WORKING ALL TOGETHER ONE DAY

Review 27: rating 1.0. Only works for a few months. Only had for a few months and it stopped working.

Review 28: rating 1.0. Stopped working I think I only used the drill  few  times before it stopped working. The drill doesn’t turn on anymore.

Review 29: rating 2.0. That's what I get for trying to save money... I loved this! It worked so well for ONE MONTH! All of a sudden, the motor quit and it won't turn on anymore. Of course it's outside of the return time by now. I should have used it sooner so I could have returned it. Yeah, I know it was inexpensive, but I was really hoping it would have lasted longer.

Review 30: rating 4.0. Works for a non pro like me Works super well. Different speeds that you can adjust and different directions for opposite hands. Also many adaptiors and the portable nail kit works really well too. I am no pro by any means but so far I haven’t injured myself unlike with clippers where I get too into it and bleed. I use this mostly on my toes. The ladies at the nail salon really messed me up and now they are slowly back to what they used to be like. And even better. My bf even loves me using this on him. Just hate the fact that the different tips get stuck in the machine. Some can be super difficult to take out. Wish there was some grip added to them to help pull off easier.

Review 31: rating 1.0. Was very excited when ordered my nail drill kit. ... Was very excited when ordered my nail drill kit. However, it totally destroyed my nails. It’s taking me 3 weeks now to bring my nails to normal.

Review 32: rating 2.0. Not long lasting Worked great the first couple of weeks but suddenly stopped working. It did get hot but nothing too bad. Spend your money on one that will last.

Review 33: rating 1.0. One Star When i blog it in it heat from the inside and dont work :(

Review 34: rating 2.0. Doesn't work after 6 months approximately Perfect except for the fact that over time the drill wiring seems to become lose because it works only after moving around in certain positions which becomes quite annoying. Wish it would have worked longer but for the price I guess it wasn't so bad. I would go for something better for a higher price but if you are just looking for a good price expect it to only last 6 months.

Review 35: rating 1.0. It was great, until it wasn't. Only used it 5 times. Sadly, I have to give this drill only one star. I've only had it one month. I've used it maybe 5 times and now it's not working at all. Up until now it was working great. I wasnt expecting it to last for years, given the low price, but I believe it should have lasted more than 5 uses. Very disappointed.

Review 36: rating 3.0. Three Stars Wish it had more power to grind gel polish off :/

Review 37: rating 4.0. I'm Happy With Product As a novice in doing my nails, this kit is great for me.  I would have given it five stars if more explanation were given on which tools and why.  I chose this drill after viewing many and since I have only had it a short time, it works for me. I would gladly recommend.

Review 38: rating 1.0. Broke immediately, don’t buy Negative 5 star review. I purchased this and didn’t get a chance to use it until about a year later due to extenuating circumstances. I put the first attachment in, used it and it got stuck. I tried for months to get it out so I could continue using it with no luck. So, I paid for this item and it broke immediately, never got to use it. Very disappointed. Don’t buy.

Review 39: rating 1.0. Don’t buy! This broke in 2 months, not a good quality.

Review 40: rating 2.0. Rip Unfortunately, it died on me after a year and a half. Stopped working. Up until then I thought it was great.

Review 41: rating 1.0. Faulty The drill bit won't remove after using this item once. Cant remove the drill grinder to put on the nylon wheel, clearly broken and faulty. Extremely disappointed.

Review 42: rating 1.0. The drill file piece has been stuck inside the drill since the date I received it. Horrible I really wanted to use this drill but the nail drill piece head has been stuck and won't come out. What a waste. There should be some warning before purchasing. Buyer Beware!!!

Review 43: rating 1.0. It dies I loved it 2 times then it died and my return date expired

Review 44: rating 5.0. Buy it! This little tool is a lifesaver!

Review 45: rating 1.0. Quit after first use. I received my electric manicure nail drill. I literally used it one time. It kept cutting in and out then quit. I can’t return the item because I had not had time to use it right away. Very disappointed.

Review 46: rating 1.0. IT USED TO BE one of the best nail drills UPDATE 9/28/19: I brought this nail drill last year Feb 2018 and now it’s useless! My AC adapter overheated and melted my switch in the middle of my nail job! I am very unhappy right now because it’s been over a year and I can’t get a replacement or my money back!! Please don’t waste your money... Probably one of the best drills I've ever used...it works like a dream!  You will not be disappointed and plus it comes with a handy mani/pedi kit.  It's easy to use and the motor isn't as loud as other nail drills I've used in the past.  I would highly recommend this drill if you need a good drill at a reasonable price.

Review 47: rating 5.0. Worked like a dream when i first used it ****UPDATE*****  I have been in contact with the seller  and they have been incredible! Took responsibility for rhw defective drill and offered to send a replacement and im beyond happy. Like i said it works great and cant wait to get the new drill which should be here in a few days.  I wish dealing with Customer service always went this smoothly! Worked like a dream when i first used it. I went back to use it again and it wont spin. The light is red on the plug and the drill jerks as though its going to spin but doesnt.

Review 48: rating 5.0. This works amazing excellent for beginners like me & it worked perfectly ... This works amazing excellent for beginners like me & it worked perfectly for what I needed it for buffing & filing toenails with acrylic

Review 49: rating 1.0. My girlfriend was never able to use it. I ... My girlfriend was never able to use it. I never turned when powered. Motor was OK. I took it apart to fix it (I am an experienced engineer) to no avail. Cheap bearings were totally corroded and the shaft seized. I did not return it to avoid the hazle. I lost my money. I paid for nothing.

Review 50: rating 5.0. Worth every penny....AMAZING!!! Easy to use, this drill exceeded my expectations. I am not a professional nail tech by any means I do my own nails as a hobby. This drill worked great for the powder gel nail dips.
persona: This customer prioritizes affordability and functional usability, willing to accept lower quality if the product meets basic needs at a low price, and is likely to repurchase only if the cost remains low despite durability concerns.
reference_output: rating 2.0. Beginning people fine pay a bit more for a better one It works goodBut fell apartBut still workabale
